title_en: IGN Live May Be Over, But the Rewards Keep Going - IGN
body_en:
While IGN Live has wrapped up, the celebration isn't over just yet.
IGN Rewards members still have a chance to score some amazing prizes inspired by the biggest games, experiences, and moments from IGN Live. Whether you're looking to jump into an upcoming playtest, win premium gaming hardware, or even plan your next theme park adventure, there are still several sweepstakes open for entry.
These sweepstakes are still live and accepting entries for a limited time. Be sure to visit IGN Rewards and submit your entries before the deadlines arrive.
Good luck, and thank you for joining us for another unforgettable IGN Live!
